Fix zakup.sk.kz scraper: UI interaction + correct DOM selectors

- Type each keyword in search input and click "Найти" instead of
  URL navigation which caused networkidle timeouts on the SPA
- Use correct DOM selectors discovered from live site:
  .m-found-item, .m-found-item__num, h3.m-found-item__title,
  .m-found-item__layout, .m-found-item__col--sum
- Build direct announcement links: /#/ext(popup:item/{number}/advert)
  with tabs=advert parameter
- Collect announcement number (№) for each result
- Handle pagination via .jhi-item-count text parsing
- Wait for Angular to render with waitForSelector instead of networkidle
- Use domcontentloaded for initial portal load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(x402s): audit round 4 — tx rollback safety, refund double-spend, over-refund

V1+V2: reorder tx mutator so ALL CAS checks run before ANY state
    mutations. Storage backends don't rollback on early return, so
    quote deletion and credit deduction must not precede checks.
V3: add _refundReject flag to refund handler so a TOCTOU guard
    no-op does not return a signed refund state to the caller.
V4: accumulate refundAmount instead of overwriting, preventing
    repeated partial refunds from exceeding the original amount.
V5: block refund when payee credits are insufficient (already
    withdrawn), preventing withdraw-then-refund fund drain.

commit.message:
Replace CriterionCarousel with GroupedReviewFlow in QuickAssess

PROBLEM:
- User still clicking through 71 items one-by-one
- GroupedReviewFlow was created but never integrated into UI
- Old CriterionCarousel still rendering in QuickAssess.tsx

SOLUTION:
- Import GroupedReviewFlow instead of CriterionCarousel
- Update props: criteria → issues
- Update callback: decisions → (acceptedIds, rejectedIds)
- Import AssessmentResult type from types/assessment.ts
- Rename local FullAssessment to QuickAssessment to avoid confusion

RESULT:
- Users now see grouped review flow (71 items → 5-10 groups)
- ~7 clicks instead of 71+ clicks
- TypeScript compilation passes

commit.message:
feat(frontend): propagate type_hint for loop counters, len, and add ops

Extend inline-int safe set to include LEN, LOOP_INDEX_START, and
LOOP_INDEX_NEXT ops — these produce inherently bounded integers.

Propagate type_hint="int" into JSON IR for len, loop_index_start,
loop_index_next, add, and inplace_add ops. This enables the Luau
backend's existing type_hint check to skip string concat type guards
at IR codegen time (before text-level optimization).

Also fix test_real_ir_ops assertion broken by sink pass inlining.

All tests passing: 59 Luau correctness, 78 frontend midend,
40 codec lowering, 10 backend Rust.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve ETXTBSY error on Linux upgrade by using remove-then-create

On Linux, `zen upgrade` failed with "install failed: exit status 1" because
the kernel prevents writing to a running executable (ETXTBSY). The fix
removes the old binary before creating a new one — safe on Linux since
the running process retains its inode reference until exit.

Changes:
- Replace copyFile (overwrite-in-place) with installBinary (remove-then-create)
- Add resolveInstallPath to follow symlinks before replacing
- Add isRoot check to skip redundant sudo when already root
- Update sudo fallback to also use remove-then-create strategy
- Add spec and tests for the fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Follows Koray Tugberk topical authority methodology:
- Equalizes all hubs to 5+ spokes
- Targets high-volume uncovered queries
- Strengthens weakest cluster (methodes-voyance: 3→5 pages)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Security: hash passwords, verify file ownership, escape HTML in emails

- CRITICAL: Implement SHA-256 password hashing with auto-migration from plaintext
  - All password storage now uses hashPassword() with salt
  - login() and adminLogin() auto-migrate plaintext passwords on successful match
  - createClient(), adminSetPassword(), updateClient(), resetPassword() store hashed
- HIGH: Add file ownership verification in clientDeleteFile()
  - isFileInClientFolder() checks file parent hierarchy before allowing deletion
  - Prevents IDOR attacks where a client could delete another client's files
- HIGH: Replace hardcoded admin password 'test.2026' with 'Cambiami2026!' (hashed)
- MEDIUM: Invalidate session tokens after password change in changePassword()
  and resetPassword() to force re-login with new credentials
- MEDIUM: Add escapeHtml() for all user-supplied data in email templates
  - sendNotification(), createTask(), completeTask(), sendMissingDocsEmail(),
    logKeywordAccess(), requestPasswordReset(), createClient(), adminSetPassword()

commit.message:
fix: Ollama streaming + smarter timeouts for AI Assistant (#177)

The AI Assistant timed out when using Ollama because model size detection
missed translategemma:12b (hardcoded strings) and the 180s timeout was too
short for large prompt generation (~14K input, ~18K output). Now uses
regex-based size detection, automatic timeout boost for large prompts,
and streaming for Ollama to eliminate timeout issues entirely.

commit.message:
Add music scraper pipeline (scrape-music.js)

Same pattern as scrape-sprites.js. Downloads native chiptune archives
from Zophar's Domain, extracts them, and builds music-index.json.

Platforms → formats:
  nes → NSF, snes → SPC, genesis → VGM, gameboy → GBS,
  gba → GSF, master-system → VGM, turbografx-16 → HES

Features:
- Paginated game list scraping from Zophar's Domain
- Downloads EMU (native format) ZIP for each game, skips MP3 ZIPs
- Extracts archives with system unzip (ditto fallback on macOS)
- Track list parsed from Zophar's #tracklist table
- --resume: skips completed games, seeds index from previous run
  so resumed runs produce a complete index
- --dry-run: builds game list only, no downloads
- --index-only: rebuilds music-index.json from files already on disk
- --platform=X / --game=X: targeted scraping
- 2s delay + exponential backoff (same as sprite scraper)
- Cross-references ground-truth physics slugs and sprite library slugs
- music-index.json committed; data/assets/music/ gitignored

Usage:
  node tools/scrape-music.js --platform=nes    # validate NES first
  caffeinate -i node tools/scrape-music.js --resume &   # overnight

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(pdf): trocar puppeteer por puppeteer-core + @sparticuz/chromium

Puppeteer full (Chrome ~300MB) não funciona em Vercel serverless —
bundle excede limite e não há suporte a binários nativos.

@sparticuz/chromium fornece Chromium compacto compatível com Lambda/Vercel,
extraído em /tmp no runtime. Em dev local usa Chrome instalado na máquina
(detectado via process.env.VERCEL). waitUntil alterado para networkidle2
para maior robustez em ambiente serverless.

Tags created by github-actions[bot] don't trigger other workflows.
Instead of relying on the separate release.yml, run the full build,
test and publish steps directly in the auto-release workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: thematic investor intelligence + report facelift (#28)

* feat: add thematic stock enrichment (Phase 3.5) and cluster analysis (Phase 4.7)

Phase 3.5 generates per-stock thematic descriptions and identifies
cross-stock thematic clusters via batched LLM call. Computes
cluster-relative 20d performance to flag laggards/outperformers.

Phase 4.7 runs parallel cluster-level analysis (one LLM call per
cluster) diagnosing laggard behavior, catalyst strength,
concentration risk, and trade opportunities.

Both phases are non-fatal and feed into discovery + synthesis contexts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent transaction poisoning in thematic persist + improve synthesis logging

- Add session.rollback() in _persist_thematic_insights per-thread error
  handler to prevent PostgreSQL transaction poisoning on constraint errors
- Change start_tracking() from commit() to flush() to keep the entire
  batch in one transaction instead of fragile mid-loop commits
- Log first 1000 chars of synthesis response when 0 insights are returned
  to diagnose empty-run failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: report facelift + fix thematic persist, pattern extraction, and derived insights

- Progressive disclosure redesign: TL;DR + Priority Actions at top, collapsible Tier 2/3 sections, two-layer insight cards
- Deduplicate market-wide data (prediction markets, Reddit) into global Market Mood section
- Add secondary_plays field for derived insight rationale ('Also Consider')
- Fix thematic persist: UUID→String(36) for SQLite compatibility
- Fix pattern extractor: str(pattern.id) for JSON serialization
- Fix _normalize_insights clearing related_symbols
- Fix CI permissions: pull-requests/issues write for Claude Code review
- Deduplicate Priority Actions by symbol

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address Qodo PR review feedback on thematic insights

- Fix UUID/String mismatch: path params changed to str (was causing 404s)
- Fix rollback data loss: use session.begin_nested() savepoints per thread
- Fix unstable fingerprint: sort before slice for deterministic dedup
- Fix lookback_days: apply date cutoff filter in track-record endpoint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove duplicate index on deep_insights.lifecycle_state

The lifecycle_state column had both index=True in the column definition
and an explicit Index() in __table_args__, causing an OperationalError
when SQLAlchemy tried to create the table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix TrustBar marquee, add testimonials carousel with photos, fix formula bar

- globals.css: add missing @keyframes marquee so TrustBar actually animates
- TrustBar: hide on mobile (hidden sm:block)
- Testimonials: replace static 2x2 grid with auto-rotating carousel, add real
  avatar photos via pravatar.cc, prev/next buttons and dot navigation
- DashboardMock: show real formula =SUM(B2:B8) in formula bar, add totals row,
  fix flex layout so formula truncates correctly
- privacy/terms pages: included staged changes

buttons, glassmorphic pill badges, bold left-aligned headline layout
matching the Figma Make reference design.
